items.name: Gold Medal Goggles
items.description: WhoseTrade collab with Olympic Snow Board Gold Medalist Jamie Anderson for the Virtual Vote. Voting is your voice. Register now.

items.name: Team USA Elite Snow Goggles
items.description: WhoseTrade x “Virtual Vote” limited edition goggles. Virtual Vote is the world's first Roblox voter awareness campaign. Voting is your voice. Make it heard and check your registration status now.

items.name: Frosty Forest Goggles
items.description: Embrace the chill with the Frosty Forest Goggles! These eye-catching goggles come in a burst of colors and showcase a charming pine tree visor, making them a must-have accessory for any snow-loving avatar.
